body: Hi Amara, I wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week and share a quick update on where [CarbonLedger](carbonledger.co) is headed into Q2. We've just closed out our first enterprise pilot with a mid-sized logistics firm and the data integrity results have honestly exceeded what we projected — 94% ledger reconciliation accuracy without manual intervention. Given your focus at [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) on climate infrastructure, I think the timing feels right to revisit the conversation around a seed extension. I'd love to walk you through the updated metrics and our revised go-to-market for the industrial supply chain vertical. Would you have 30 minutes sometime in the next two weeks for a call? Happy to work around your schedule.
